# label

**Instance Property**

A string used to name your effect.

## Declaration

```swift
var label: String? { get set }
```

## Discussion

The name of the effect isn’t used directly by GLKit, but is printed when, for example, you log the object to the console via the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/NSLog(_:_:)] function in Swift, or the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/NSLog] function in Objective-C.
title: label
